SALCommand.Description: Add a feature to the disable list.

item.Description:
Features to add to the disable list. A bitmask of ControlFeature enum values.
Current options are: - ROOM_SETPOINT (0x1): The dome room setpoint controlled by the HVAC AHUs 1-4. - AHU (0x2): Enabling/disabling the HVAC AHUs when the dome opens or closes. - VEC04 (0x4): The VEC-04 exhaust fan on level 5. - GLYCOL_CHILLERS (0x8): The EGW mixture chiller temperature regulated by the HVAC. - FANSPEED (0x10): The M1M3 thermal system fan speed; also controls tuning of the gap between EGW temperature and heater setpoint in M1M3TS. - M1M3TS (0x20): All M1M3TS control functions. - REQUIRE_DOME_OPEN (0x40): Disable the dome open requirement; system operates as if the dome were open.

SALCommand.Description: Remove a feature from the disable list.

item.Description:
Features to remove from the disable list. A bitmask of ControlFeature enum values.
Current options are: - ROOM_SETPOINT (0x1): The dome room setpoint controlled by the HVAC AHUs 1-4. - AHU (0x2): Enabling/disabling the HVAC AHUs when the dome opens or closes. - VEC04 (0x4): The VEC-04 exhaust fan on level 5. - GLYCOL_CHILLERS (0x8): The EGW mixture chiller temperature regulated by the HVAC. - FANSPEED (0x10): The M1M3 thermal system fan speed; also controls tuning of the gap between EGW temperature and heater setpoint in M1M3TS. - M1M3TS (0x20): All M1M3TS control functions. - REQUIRE_DOME_OPEN (0x40): Disable the dome open requirement; system operates as if the dome were open.
